lead: Figures on this page are verified against the sources below.

sources.label: Coriolis
sources.what: Interactive outfitting & build planner, used to model the exploration FSD/scoop/internal fit on this hull.

sources.label: Elite Dangerous (official)
sources.what: Frontier's official Beluga Liner ship page — manufacturer specs, hull mass/speed, and the ship render used on this page.

sources.label: EDCD coriolis-data
sources.what: Core slot sizes (class-7 FSD, optional internals 6·6·6·6·5·5·4·3·3·3·3·1) and engineering blueprint data behind the loadout.

sources.label: Inara — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Stock hull stats, internal layout, and module sellers cross-checked for the exploration build.

sources.label: Fandom — Beluga Liner
sources.what: Manufacturer (Saud Kruger), hull role, and lore reference backing the dossier write-up.

sources.label: YouTube — Ricardos Gaming
sources.what: Deep-dive review of the Beluga Liner covering its jump range and internal module space — context for its limits as an explorer.
